name: Colbor CL60 Bi-Color LED Monolight
description: The ultracompact, lightweight, and portable CL60 Bi-Color LED Monolight from COLBOR features a 2700-6500K COB LED lamp bead with an impressive CRI rating of 97.

features.Key Features :: For Video Production and Vlogging | 20,240 Lux at 3.3' with Reflector | 2700-6500K CCT, CRI 97 | AC or Optional V-Mount / NP-F Batteries | Supports PD Power Bank | Proprietary Wireless, App Control | LCD Display, 10 Special Effects | Weighs 1.2 lb | Bowens Accessory Mount | Modular & Stackable Design
features.Standard Package: COLBOR CL60 Bi-Color LED Monolight | Reflector | Standard Adapter | Power Adapter | Light Base | COB Protective Cover | Carrying Bag
